title: Trims++
description: New trims, materials and wings trims!
body:
**Trims++** datapack adds:
### New Trims
#### - ![[Frost armor trim image]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9fd240702ece4a99a2da881496c72b6e20201ef.png) Frost armor trim
#### - ![[Portal armor trim image]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00bb281e71ebe212fdfaec476a66051a3e15bf57.png) Portal armor trim
#### - ![[Typhoon armor trim image]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c3e532ba5c13ea4832b3e67e01c83377c105688.png) Typhoon armor trim
#### - ![[Ore armor trim image]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5792339ea42747d1b11dee01b25fd2d0c8a04740.png) Ore armor trim

### New Materials
#### - ![[Rose Quartz image]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32e17a134ac369d94f3831f79c59f3d3c99af79a.png) Rose Quartz (From Create)
![[Rose quartz material]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d1f8d3a26ef947651618bc270ac27922d811b5f.png)
#### - ![[Echo Shard image]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29412c7737a8ce3791eae753b79d911b5f4e543e.png) Echo Shard
![[Echo material]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cace11f93b016bc9be4ab30ba363d77dffee4055.jpeg)
#### - ![[Blaze Rod image]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/557f8140b98d1f5082be8138ab2bf3d21a6856cd.png) Blaze Rod
![[Blaze Rod material]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e060393826a6719c7896f9295d72cbcf2b0692a.jpeg)
#### - ![[Breeze Rod image]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1f604e98c11b1b956ac5c3d00510afaf76b9307.webp) Breeze Rod
![[Breeze Rod Material]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/125226ee48679ba2708cdb823a24799faebde6ed.jpeg)


You can also apply **Armor Trims** on **ELytras** now.

![[elytra trim]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49e6f598556b6f12f1606bdbf9c96d5ce4dcc193.jpeg)
(Silence for example)


This datapack is translated to:
- English (US)
- Portuguese (Português)
- Portuguese (Brasilian) (Português Brasileiro)
- Russian (Русский)
- Ukrainian (Українська)
- German (Deutsch)

If you found bags or bad translation, write me on discord (theslimy)

I hope you will enjoy :)

Thx JoeFly for the Portuguese translation, you may like his [datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tool-trims). If you see this, hi Joe!

Also I borrowed some texures for elytras from Elytra Trims, also go check [them](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-trims)
